title: Sandbox – Entries & Mounts

classes.name: BaseEntry
classes.notes: Registry pattern: all concrete subclasses auto-register via __pydantic_init_subclass__. parse() dispatches by 'type' field.

classes.name: Dir
classes.notes: apply() calls session.mkdir(), _apply_metadata(), then session._apply_entry_batch() for children.

classes.name: LocalFile
classes.notes: Computes sha256 checksum before upload; raises LocalFileReadError/LocalChecksumError on failure.

classes.name: LocalDir
methods: _copy_local_dir_file(base_dir, session, src_root, src, dest_root, user) -> MaterializedFile  [async]
classes.notes: Uses dir-fd pinning (O_DIRECTORY/O_NOFOLLOW) on Linux. Symlinks are rejected. Concurrent file copy via gather_in_order(). If src is None, creates empty dir only.

classes.name: GitRepo
classes.notes: Clones into /tmp inside sandbox, then cp -R to dest. Tries fetch-by-commit-sha first for 40-char hashes.

classes.name: Mount
classes.notes: Always ephemeral (snapshots exclude mounts). apply() delegates to mount_strategy.activate(). unmount() delegates to mount_strategy.deactivate(). Permissions on mounts are reset to defaults with a warning.

classes.name: MountStrategyBase
methods: activate(mount, session, dest, base_dir) -> list[MaterializedFile]  [abstract, async]
deactivate(mount, session, dest, base_dir) -> None  [abstract, async]

classes.name: InContainerMountStrategy
classes.notes: All lifecycle calls delegate to mount.in_container_adapter(). Returns None for docker volume config.

classes.name: DockerVolumeMountStrategy
classes.notes: activate/deactivate are no-ops (backend attaches volumes before session starts). Requires session.supports_docker_volume_mounts().

classes.name: _ConfiguredMount
methods: _build_rclone_config(session, pattern, remote_kind, remote_path, required_lines, include_config_text) -> RcloneMountConfig  [async]
classes.notes: Provides shared rclone config-building logic for all provider mounts. Overrides both adapter methods to return standard adapters.

classes.name: S3Mount
classes.notes: Supports both rclone and aws-mountpoint drivers. Uses env_auth=true when no credentials provided.

classes.name: GCSMount
classes.notes: Dual auth modes: (1) HMAC credentials → rclone S3 backend with GCS provider; (2) native GCS → rclone google cloud storage backend. Default endpoint: https://storage.googleapis.com.

classes.name: AzureBlobMount
classes.notes: Supports rclone (azureblob type) and blobfuse2 (FuseMountPattern). Auth: account_key or MSI (use_msi=true + optional msi_client_id).

classes.name: R2Mount
classes.notes: Rclone only (no mountpoint/fuse support). Uses rclone S3 backend with provider=Cloudflare. Default endpoint: https://{account_id}.r2.cloudflarestorage.com or custom_domain.

relationships: Mount *-- MountStrategyBase : mount_strategy (composition, validated on init)
InContainerMountStrategy --> InContainerMountAdapter : delegates lifecycle via mount.in_container_adapter()
DockerVolumeMountStrategy --> DockerVolumeMountAdapter : delegates driver config via mount.docker_volume_adapter()

external_types.MountPattern: Abstract base for in-container mount execution patterns
external_types.RcloneMountPattern: Runs rclone mount command; builds rclone config file per-session
external_types.MountpointMountPattern: Runs aws mountpoint-s3; used by S3Mount and GCSMount
external_types.FuseMountPattern: Runs blobfuse2; used by AzureBlobMount only
external_types.RcloneMountConfig: Runtime config for RcloneMountPattern (remote_name, remote_path, config_text, read_only)
external_types.MountpointMountConfig: Runtime config for MountpointMountPattern (bucket, credentials, prefix, etc.)
external_types.FuseMountConfig: Runtime config for FuseMountPattern (account, container, auth)
external_types.MountPatternConfig: Union type alias for all pattern config types
external_types.BaseSandboxSession: Sandbox session interface; provides exec(), mkdir(), write(), state
external_types.MaterializedFile: Record of a file staged into the sandbox (path + sha256)
external_types.Permissions: Pydantic model: owner/group/other FileMode + directory flag
external_types.FileMode: Enum: READ, WRITE, EXEC, ALL combinations

key_design_patterns: Registry pattern on BaseEntry and MountStrategyBase: subclasses auto-register on class creation via __pydantic_init_subclass__; parse() dispatches by 'type' string field
Strategy pattern: Mount delegates all lifecycle (activate/deactivate/snapshot) to MountStrategyBase subclass
Adapter pattern: InContainerMountAdapter and DockerVolumeMountAdapter decouple strategy logic from provider-specific config
Template method: _ConfiguredMount._build_rclone_config() is the shared rclone config builder; providers supply only _rclone_required_lines()
Dual strategy shapes: same provider mount (e.g. S3Mount) can work as either in-container (rclone/mountpoint CLI) or docker_volume (named Docker volume with driver)
business_rules: Mount entries are always ephemeral=True; snapshots never persist mount state
Mount permissions are reset to defaults (755) with a warning; access control must be done at cloud provider level
Every Mount must support at least one strategy shape (in_container or docker_volume), enforced in model_post_init
AzureBlobMount only supports rclone docker driver (not mountpoint)
GCSMount supports two rclone auth modes: native GCS vs HMAC S3-compatible (detected by presence of access_id+secret_access_key)
LocalDir rejects symlinks at every level of traversal; uses dir-fd pinning on Linux to prevent TOCTOU race conditions
GitRepo tries shallow fetch-by-commit-sha first for 7-40 hex refs, falls back to clone --branch
important_notes: All entry types use Pydantic BaseModel with discriminated union dispatched via 'type' literal field. The BaseEntry.parse() factory is the main entry point for deserializing manifest entries. Mount subclasses inherit from _ConfiguredMount (not Mount directly) to get standard adapter implementations. Provider config methods return (driver_name, options_dict, read_only) tuples for docker-volume mode.
